factors.impact: 2~3개월 내 종전 확률 상승
factors.detail: 트럼프 대통령이 공개적으로 전쟁이 "4-5주 내"에 끝날 것이라고 발언했습니다.

factors.impact: 단기 종전 가능성 증가
factors.detail: 이스라엘이 이란 방공망의 핵심을 무력화했습니다.

factors.impact: 전쟁 지속 능력 약화로 단기 종전 가능성 증가
factors.detail: 이란의 보복 미사일 타격 능력이 약 90% 감소했습니다.

factors.factor: 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄 → 국제 경제 압력
factors.impact: 경제적 압력으로 빠른 해결 촉구
factors.detail: 세계 원유의 약 20%가 호르무즈 해협을 통과합니다.

factors.impact: 다자간 분쟁으로 협상 복잡화
factors.detail: 참전국이 많을수록 휴전 협상이 복잡해집니다.

factors.impact: 정권 붕괴 가능성과 내부 혼란 장기화 위험
factors.detail: 최고지도자의 사망으로 정권 내부에 큰 혼란이 발생합니다.

factors.impact: 지상전 확대로 전쟁 장기화 위험
factors.detail: 쿠르드 페쉬메르가 부대가 북부 전선을 열었습니다.

factors.impact: 이란의 협상 의지 → 단기 종전 가능성 증가
factors.detail: 이란이 비밀 채널을 통해 협상을 시도했습니다.

factors.impact: 제공권→지상작전→빠른 종결 패턴
factors.detail: 이번 전쟁은 걸프전과 매우 유사한 패턴을 보입니다.

factors.impact: 외교적 해결 움직임 포착
factors.detail: 실시간 뉴스에서 협상 관련 기사 12건이 감지되었습니다.

factors.impact: 주변국 연루 확대로 장기화 위험
factors.detail: 주변국을 언급하는 기사 14.2건이 감지되었습니다.

factors.impact: 미국 내 정치적 지지로 군사작전 지속 가능
factors.detail: 미 상원이 전쟁권한 제한 결의안을 부결시켰습니다.

factors.impact: 이란 포위망 강화 → 조기 항복 가능성
factors.detail: 사우디와 UAE가 연합군에 합류했습니다.

factors.impact: 공식 휴전 또는 평화 합의 체결. 휴전 합의는 전쟁 종결의 결정적 단계이며, 합의 후 이행까지 평균 1~2주 소요.
factors.detail:
공식 휴전 또는 평화 합의 체결. 휴전 합의는 전쟁 종결의 결정적 단계이며, 합의 후 이행까지 평균 1~2주 소요.

신뢰도: 확실 (100%), 관련 기사 8건 감지.
관련: Middle East crisis live: Iran war ceasefire doesn’t include Lebanon, says Israel; Trump says uranium will be ‘taken care of’ | ‘Desperately searching for any sort of exit ramp’: US political leaders react as Trump announces ceasefire | Trump announces two-week ceasefire as Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz Strait

factors.impact: 교전국의 일방적 전투 축소 또는 자제 선언. 역사적으로 패전국의 자발적 전선 축소는 80% 이상 공식 항복의 전조.
factors.detail:
교전국의 일방적 전투 축소 또는 자제 선언. 역사적으로 패전국의 자발적 전선 축소는 80% 이상 공식 항복의 전조.

신뢰도: 높음 (67%), 관련 기사 2건 감지.
관련: Iran agrees to open Strait of Hormuz for two-week US ceasefire

factors.impact: 대규모 인도주의 위기. 국제사회 개입 압력 증가. 코소보(1999): 난민 위기가 NATO 작전 가속화. 인도적 위기는 국제 종전 압력을 2~3배 강화.
factors.detail:
대규모 인도주의 위기. 국제사회 개입 압력 증가. 코소보(1999): 난민 위기가 NATO 작전 가속화. 인도적 위기는 국제 종전 압력을 2~3배 강화.

신뢰도: 높음 (67%), 관련 기사 2건 감지.
관련: Trump’s Iran Threats Look Like Self-Incrimination for Potential War Crimes

factors.impact: 분쟁 확대 또는 신규 참전. 역사적으로 참전국 1개 추가 시 평균 전쟁 기간 30~50% 증가 (Correlates of War 데이터).
factors.detail:
분쟁 확대 또는 신규 참전. 역사적으로 참전국 1개 추가 시 평균 전쟁 기간 30~50% 증가 (Correlates of War 데이터).

신뢰도: 높음 (67%), 관련 기사 2건 감지.
관련: Djibouti and the Horn of Africa: new front in the war on Iran

factors.impact: 중간 수준 경제 압력
factors.detail: WTI 유가가 $95.67/배럴로 90달러 이상입니다. 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄와 맞물려 글로벌 에너지 시장에 큰 충격을 주고 있으며, 주요국들의 조기 종전 압력이 강화되고 있습니다.

factors.impact: 안전자산 수요 폭증 → 글로벌 불안 심화
factors.detail: 금 가격이 온스당 $4828.9로 사상 최고 수준입니다. 투자자들이 안전자산으로 대거 이동하고 있으며, 이는 전쟁 장기화에 대한 시장의 우려를 반영합니다.

factors.impact: 시장 공포 심화 → 정치적 종전 압력 증가
factors.detail: VIX 지수가 25.78로 25 이상의 불안 수준입니다. 금융시장 불안이 커지면서 각국 정부에 전쟁 종결 압력이 가해지고 있습니다.

latest_news.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran war ceasefire doesn’t include Lebanon, says Israel; Trump says uranium will be ‘taken care of’
latest_news.snippet: Pakistan’s PM had said the ceasefire would cover Lebanon;  Iran says passage through the strait of Hormuz will be allowed for the next 2 weeksUS and Iran agree to provisional ceasefire with Tehran say

latest_news.title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
latest_news.snippet: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

latest_news.title: Shelly Kittleson, American Journalist Abducted in Iraq, Is Freed
latest_news.snippet: The journalist, Shelly Kittleson, was abducted by a militia allied with Iran and held for a week. Iraqi officials say she was freed in exchange for the release of militia members.

latest_news.title: Hours Before News of Cease-Fire, Pope Leo XIV Issues Strong Rebuke of Trump
latest_news.snippet: The first U.S.-born pontiff has consistently called for dialogue to resolve the war in the Middle East. He referred to Trump’s Iran threats as ‘truly unacceptable.’

latest_news.title: Trump Says He Has Agreed to a 2-Week Cease-Fire With Iran
latest_news.snippet: President Trump announced the deal hours after threatening that a “whole civilization will die tonight” if Iran did not allow commercial vessels to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
latest_news.snippet: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

latest_news.title: Climate activist Greta Thunberg slams Trump’s threats against Iran
latest_news.snippet: Polls have found that young people in the United States are more sceptical of foreign intervention and war on Iran.

latest_news.title: Trump administration reaffirms plans to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
latest_news.snippet: Abrego Garcia's wrongful removal in 2025 has spurred criticism of the Trump administration's mass deportation campaign.

latest_news.title: ‘Desperately searching for any sort of exit ramp’: US political leaders react as Trump announces ceasefire
latest_news.snippet: Chuck Schumer attacks president’s ‘ridiculous bluster’ while Republicans cast decision as shrewd tactical moveUS and Iran agree to provisional ceasefireMiddle East crisis – live updatesPolitical leade

latest_news.title: Oil prices slide, stocks surge as Trump announces two-week Iran ceasefire
latest_news.snippet: Investors welcome the possible resumption of oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.title: Trump Backs Down, but Questions Remain Over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.snippet: President Trump’s short-term intimidation may have worked, but the fundamental divides with Iran are as sharp as they were in February.

latest_news.title: American journalist released a week after being kidnapped in Iraq
latest_news.snippet: Freelancer Shelly Kittleson was reportedly held by Iran-backed militia which says she must now leave countryThe US journalist Shelly Kittleson, who was kidnapped from a Baghdad street corner last week

latest_news.title: Iran says talks with US will begin in Pakistan’s Islamabad on Friday
latest_news.snippet: Tehran says the negotiations will be based on its 10-point proposal, which calls for control over Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.title: Iran agrees to open Strait of Hormuz for two-week US ceasefire
latest_news.snippet: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says ‘if attacks against Iran are halted,’ then Iran agrees to a US ceasefire.

latest_news.snippet: The White House has confirmed the US has agreed to suspend all bombing and military attacks on Iran for two weeks.

articles.snippet: President Trump’s short-term intimidation may have worked, but the fundamental divides with Iran are as sharp as they were in February.

articles.snippet: President Trump, in vowing to systematically destroy civilian infrastructure and annihilate Iran’s entire civilization, appears to be creating evidence about his intentions.

articles.title: Democrats Condemn Trump’s Iran Threats as Some Call for His Removal Via 25th Amendment
articles.snippet: More than 70 Democratic lawmakers, questioning his mental fitness, called for the president’s removal from office through impeachment or the 25th Amendment.

articles.title: Trump’s Threat to Wipe Out a ‘Whole Civilization’ Appalls Some Conservatives
articles.snippet: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Tucker Carlson and Senator Ron Johnson were among those pushing back against President Trump’s threats toward Iran.

articles.title: Iranians Voice Shock and Defiance in Face of Trump’s Looming Deadline
articles.snippet: President Trump has threatened devastating attacks if Iran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Some Iranians questioned what had happened to American values.

articles.snippet: The vote came hours before an 8 p.m. deadline set by President Trump to reach a deal to reopen the waterway.

articles.title: Iran War Timeline: Key Moments and Attacks In U.S. and Israel’s Campaign
articles.snippet: The United States and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28, starting a weekslong war that spread to neighboring countries and rocked global markets.

articles.title: Britain Reinforces That U.S. Cannot Use British Bases for Attacks on Iran
articles.snippet: The U.K. government underlined its previous stance that the United States could only use British bases for defensive purposes, after President Trump threatened to strike civilian targets.

articles.title: Djibouti and the Horn of Africa: new front in the war on Iran
articles.snippet: Djibouti built its economy on the strategy of charging rent to different military world powers.

articles.title: U.S. Warns of Cyberattacks Tied to Iran on Water and Energy Systems
articles.snippet: The warning did not name specific facilities that had been struck or say whether any damage had been done.

articles.title: How is the US-Israel war on Iran affecting Russian-Iranian relations?
articles.snippet: Moscow has been benefitting from the higher oil prices while its ally is under attack.

articles.snippet: As the United States’ 8 p.m. deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz approaches, Iran vowed to retaliate if its power plants were attacked.

articles.snippet: Both the U.S. and Iran are now talking about imposing fees on ships using the vital passageway. That could fray a treaty that ended centuries of lawlessness on the high seas.

articles.snippet: The couple, who had been arrested during a tourist visit in 2022, were accused of spying in a case that galvanized the French public.
